data_mode_note: Volumes, trends and momentum are REAL Signal data (pulled 2026-06-09, monthly Nov 2025-Jun 2026). Each theme uses its primary Signal topic for this backfill; negativity uses per-theme estimates and event-severity is proxied from monthly volume spikes (the monthly job swaps in live sentiment + events). Regulatory items are web-researched, sourced and reviewed/approved (2026-06-09).

automotive.name: EU Battery Passport
automotive.summary: From 18 Feb 2027, EV & industrial batteries >2 kWh must carry a digital battery passport (QR + CE marking) covering provenance, carbon footprint and recyclability.

automotive.name: US NHTSA 2026 vehicle safety standards
automotive.summary: All light vehicles certified for sale on or after 1 Jan 2027 must meet the full 2026 federal safety standards.

automotive.name: EU heavy-truck advanced emergency braking
automotive.summary: Phased-in advanced emergency braking (AEB) requirements for heavy trucks (N2/N3) begin 1 Jan 2027.

energy.name: EU CBAM certificate purchasing begins
energy.summary: Sales of CBAM certificates to importers begin 1 Feb 2027; first surrender for 2026 imports due 30 Sep 2027. Definitive-period obligations have applied since Jan 2026.

finance.name: UK Basel 3.1 capital package
finance.summary: The PRA's Basel 3.1 package takes effect 1 Jan 2027 (FRTB internal-model approach deferred to 2028).

finance.name: EU AML package (AMLR + AMLA)
finance.summary: The single EU AML rulebook (AMLR) and new Anti-Money Laundering Authority (AMLA) phase in, with core requirements applying from 2027.

healthcare.name: EU HTA Regulation — JCA scope expansion
healthcare.summary: Joint Clinical Assessments expand through 2026 (oncology, advanced therapies, and high-risk medical devices) under the EU HTA Regulation.

healthcare.name: US IRA Medicare price negotiation (cycle 2)
healthcare.summary: Negotiated 'maximum fair prices' for the second round of selected Medicare Part D drugs take effect 1 Jan 2027.

technology.name: EU AI Act — AI-content transparency
technology.summary: Obligations to label/watermark AI-generated content apply from 2 Dec 2026 (per the May 2026 'Digital Omnibus' revision).

technology.name: EU AI Act — high-risk obligations
technology.summary: High-risk (Annex III) AI obligations now apply from 2 Dec 2027 after the omnibus delay (product-embedded systems: Aug 2028). A key date to plan for now.

fmcg.name: EU Packaging & Packaging Waste Regulation (PPWR)
fmcg.summary: PPWR applies from 12 Aug 2026 — recyclability-by-design, heavy-metal/PFAS limits and conformity declarations. Hard deadline, no grace period.

fmcg.name: EU Deforestation Regulation (EUDR)
fmcg.summary: Due-diligence compliance binding for large & medium operators from 30 Dec 2026 (palm oil, cocoa, coffee, soy, cattle, rubber, wood).

fmcg.name: EUDR — micro & small enterprises
fmcg.summary: EUDR compliance date for micro & small enterprises: 30 Jun 2027.

media.name: EU EMFA — audiovisual customization rights
media.summary: European Media Freedom Act provisions on user customization of audiovisual media offers apply from 8 May 2027 (Article 18 VLOP content safeguards already in force).

retail.name: EU Packaging & Packaging Waste Regulation (PPWR)
retail.summary: PPWR applies from 12 Aug 2026; all packaging placed on the EU market must comply from day one.

retail.name: EU Deforestation Regulation (EUDR)
retail.summary: Due-diligence binding for large & medium operators 30 Dec 2026; affects grocery commodities (palm oil, cocoa, coffee, soy, beef).

retail.name: CSRD / Audit Directive transposition (Omnibus I)
retail.summary: Member states must transpose the revised CSRD and Audit Directive changes by 19 Mar 2027; listed-SME reporting begins on FY2026.

professional_services.name: EU simplified ESRS reporting standards
professional_services.summary: Commission to publish the revised, simplified ESRS standards (delegated act) by mid-2026 — roughly 61% fewer mandatory data points.

professional_services.name: CSRD / Audit Directive transposition (Omnibus I)
professional_services.summary: Member states must transpose the Omnibus I CSRD and Audit Directive changes by 19 Mar 2027.

travel.name: EU ETIAS travel authorisation launch
travel.summary: ETIAS for visa-free visitors is expected to begin operating in Q4 2026, with a transitional/grace period before enforcement. (EES has been live since Apr 2026.)

travel.name: EU ETIAS mandatory enforcement
travel.summary: ETIAS becomes mandatory for entry after the 2026 transitional period concludes in 2027.

events.title: Trump says he will raise US tariffs on EU cars and trucks to 25%
3,700 Waymo vehicles recalled over software issue
Ford recalls over 179,000 Bronco and Ranger vehicles over seat defect
GM recalls 40K contaminated brake-fluid bottles affecting stopping power
Drone strike sparks fire at Abu Dhabi nuclear plant
British Gas to pay £20m fine following regulator's prepayment-meter probe
Ukraine strike hits Tuapse oil terminal — fourth attack in two weeks
HSBC reviews lending policies after $400 million fraud hit
IMF warns AI-driven cyber threats could destabilise global financial markets
PayPal, Visa and Mastercard hit by UK competition probe
Morrisons issues urgent recall after glass shards found in nut packets
Naphtha shortage forces Calbee chips into monochrome packaging
Pharmacist says shortage of 188 common NHS drugs is 'worst I've known'
Trump refiles $10B lawsuit against Wall Street Journal
Ireland's Children's Rights Alliance asks Meta to cooperate with probe
STV staff walk out on strike on day of Holyrood election count
Kirby McInerney announces investigation into potential AECOM securities fraud
Four states launch lawsuits against proxy adviser ISS over ESG agenda
Grant Shapps quits aerospace firm after watchdog probe
EU fines Temu €200 million over illegal-product sales
QUIZ sets 37 stores for closure
Morrisons issues urgent recall after glass shards found in nut packets
US lawmakers demand answers from Instructure after Canvas data breaches
Tech layoffs continue as Meta restructures for AI; LinkedIn cuts 600+ jobs
iPhone users could get up to $95 after Apple settles lawsuit
United flight landing at Newark strikes pole on NJ Turnpike
Frankfurt Airport disrupted by Lufthansa strikes
